Generated Wikiwiki site

Compile UX and DX human wikis through agent-mediated drafts

Generate both UX and DX compile drafts by default, let the active IDE agent author the prose, then validate and publish the result with wk compile apply.

Home / Decisions
Decision compileuxdxagent-workflowagentic-ide

Context

The project should eventually derive procedurally created human-readable wikis while integrating naturally with modern agentic IDE frameworks.

Decision

Generate both UX and DX compile drafts by default, let the active IDE agent author the prose, then validate and publish the result with wk compile apply.

Consequences

wk stays provider-agnostic while becoming useful as repo memory middleware for Codex, Cursor, Claude Code, and similar agentic IDEs.
